description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named linters that runs on push to master and on pull requests to master. Run three separate jobs on ubuntu-20.04: rubocop, clang_format, and clang_static_analyzer. Each job checks out the repository and then performs specific linting tasks: rubocop checks Ruby code with bundle exec rubocop, clang_format checks C++ code with clang-format, and clang_static_analyzer analyzes C++ code with scan-build-11 and uploads a report on failure.
